title: Platform Functionality
excerpt: Our boards have been experiencing functionality issues over the last few weeks - automations not working, default item values not populating and most concerningly, integrations turning off or going “red” and not working.…

posts.author: MondayMorgan (Morgan )
posts.cookedHtml: Our boards have been experiencing functionality issues over the last few weeks - automations not working, default item values not populating and most concerningly, integrations turning off or going “red” and not working. Not across the whole platform, just certain boards and we cannot pinpoint the issue. Has anyone else be experiencing this?

posts.author: Silas (Silas G.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Some Ideas:

  • Maybe there is an conflict between two types of values - default an preset-values(Rules like "When item created…)
  • Check the automations, turn off redundancies.
  • Check your apps, deinstall unused integrations/apps.
  • Copy the board with all values/automations and try to replicate the issue.
  • Contact the tecnical support via the Monday form (Profilpicture-Help-Contact). Make sure to allow board access for the supportteam in your monday admin settings.
